testcase.name: shouldCharge1PercentNetworkFee

failure.message: 1% network fee calculations (3 failures) org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Fee should be 1% of $100 = $1 ==> expected: <1.0> but was: <1.00> org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Fee should be 1% of $1000 = $10 ==> expected: <10.0> but was: <10.00> org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Fee should be 1% of $5000 = $50 ==> expected: <50.0> but was: <50.00>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.MultipleFailuresError: 1% network fee calculations (3 failures) org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Fee should be 1% of $100 = $1 ==> expected: <1.0> but was: <1.00> org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Fee should be 1% of $1000 = $10 ==> expected: <10.0> but was: <10.00> org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Fee should be 1% of $5000 = $50 ==> expected: <50.0> but testcase.name: shouldHandleSmallAmountsCorrectly

failure.message: Small amount (1 failure) org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Fee should be 1% of $0.01 = $0.0001 ==> expected: <0.0001> but was: <0.00>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.MultipleFailuresError: Small amount (1 failure) org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Fee should be 1% of $0.01 = $0.0001 ==> expected: <0.0001> but was: <0.00> at testcase.name: shouldProcessVeryLargeAmounts

failure.message: Large amount processing (1 failure) org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Fee should be 1% of $1,000,000 = $10,000 ==> expected: <10000.0> but was: <10000.00>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.MultipleFailuresError: Large amount processing (1 failure) org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Fee should be 1% of $1,000,000 = $10,000 ==> expected: <10000.0> but
